policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: A clean GitHub Actions Node 22/V8 run on 2026-07-16 measured 1436 covered lines across the 1759-line core scope after adding the shared document-relative Jellyfin SPA route builders. Focused V8 evidence exercised every new executable line, including encoded parameters, invalid routes, and the parameter-free path. One line permits only negligible instrumentation variance.

Three clean reviewed local .NET 10/Coverlet integration runs on 2026-07-16 measured 16359, 16359, and 16360 covered lines across the identical 25016-line final scope after adding bounded, user-scoped SearchHint hierarchy resolution for hidden-series Season and Episode descendants, including fail-closed atomic query, user, cap, and cancellation handling. The existing two-line tolerance remains narrow and covers only reproduced cross-run instrumentation variance (0.0080 percentage points).
